case_title: DENG SHI VS. ELVA CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHI, DENG AS TO DEFENDANT ELVA CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA NATALIE'S ANTIQUES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
